results.description:
There's only one thing Nora Lindberg dislikes more than running out of chocolate, and that's Sebastian York.

It wasn't always that way. Because not too long ago, she thought he was the sexiest man she'd ever met. But when her ex gets in trouble with the local motorcycle club, Sebastian turns out to be more than just a bouncer at the nightclub she waitresses at.

Forced together to clean up the mess her ex created, she sees another side to him. One she likes entirely too much.

Because falling for the guy who holds her life in her hands would be a bad decision. Wouldn't it?
